PRISM_MOD_CARD_REINFORCE.title: Reinforce
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GUARD.title: Guard
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_WHIRLWIND.title: Prism Whirlwind
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_WHIRLWIND.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff}x{Repeat} damage to all enemies. Play {Cards:diff} random card(s) that cost 2 or more.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_ANCIENT_PRISM_WHIRLWIND.d: Deal {Damage:diff}x{Repeat} damage to all enemies. Attack Intent: Deal {Damage:diff}x{Repeat} damage to all enemies.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RADIANT_GAMBLE.title: Radiant Gamble
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RADIANT_GAMBLE.descriptio: Play random Exhaust cards until their total cost reaches {CostTotal:diff}.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BURIED.title: Buried
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BURIED.description: Gain {Block:diff} Block. Add {Cards:diff} random card(s) to your hand.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_BEAM.title: Prism Beam
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PRISM_BEAM.description: Deal {Damage:diff} damage to all enemies. Doubled for each other Prism Beam.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FIELD_PROCUREMENT.title: Field Procurement
PRISM_MOD_CARD_FIELD_PROCUREMENT.descrip: Add {Cards:diff} random playable card(s) from other characters to your hand.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_FANGS.title: Borrowed Fangs
PRISM_MOD_CARD_BORROWED_FANGS.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff}x{Repeat} damage. Play a random Attack.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_COMMON_RUMMAGE.title: Common Rummage
PRISM_MOD_CARD_COMMON_RUMMAGE.descriptio: Add {Cards:diff} random Common card(s) to your hand.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PEAK_OF_FOLLY.title: Peak of Folly
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PEAK_OF_FOLLY.description: Add {Cards:diff} random Common cards from other characters to your hand. Add {Rocks:diff} Giant Rocks to your discard pile.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GHOST_N_GOBLINS.title: Ghosts 'n Goblins
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GHOST_N_GOBLINS.descripti: Summon {Summon:diff}. Forge {Forge:diff}. Repeat this effect for each card in your Exhaust pile.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GENT_AND_FECT.title: Gent and Fect
PRISM_MOD_CARD_GENT_AND_FECT.description: Gain {Stars:diff} Stars. Gain {FocusPower:diff} Focus. Gain {OrbSlots:diff} Orb Slots.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_MIXED_SIGNALS.title: Mixed Signals
PRISM_MOD_CARD_MIXED_SIGNALS.description: Gain {Block:diff} Block. Play a random card.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_ARCHMAGES_RUNE.title: Archmage's Rune
PRISM_MOD_CARD_ARCHMAGES_RUNE.descriptio: Play random Exhaust cards from every character, colorless, and Prism card pool until their total cost reaches {CostTotal:diff}.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_DOPAMINE.title: Dopamine
PRISM_MOD_CARD_DOPAMINE.description: Whenever you play a card, add a random card to your hand with its cost set to {FreeCost:energyIcons()} and lose {DopaminePower:diff} HP.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_HIDDEN_CARD.title: Hidden Card
PRISM_MOD_CARD_HIDDEN_CARD.description: Play random Exhaust cards that cost 2 or more until their total cost reaches {CostTotal:diff}.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SCAR.title: Scar
PRISM_MOD_CARD_SCAR.description: Lose {HpLoss:diff} HP. Add {Cards:diff} Shivs to your hand.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RADIATE.title: Prism Discharge
PRISM_MOD_CARD_RADIATE.description: Play X+{BonusCards:diff} random card(s) from your Exhaust pile.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_VITAL_SPARK.title: Vital Spark
PRISM_MOD_CARD_VITAL_SPARK.description: Whenever you are attacked, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PULSATE.title: Pulsate
PRISM_MOD_CARD_PULSATE.description: At the end of each turn, play {PulsatePower:diff} random card(s).
